message:
Fix all CLI commands to use shouldOutputJson() for consistent non-TTY output

Updated the following commands to automatically output JSON when stdout
is piped (non-TTY mode), matching the behavior already implemented for
show, categories, and tags commands:

- utilities.ts: doctorCommand, aboutCommand
- bundles.ts: bundleShowCommand error handling
- export.ts: all output handling
- uninstall.ts: all output handling

This ensures consistent behavior across all CLI commands where piped
output is always JSON format, enabling better scripting and automation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
